law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the enforcement of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Document
  type MemberState
  type Procedure
  provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  is_present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_stay_conditions: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  in_possession_of_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  in_possession_of_valid_passport: Person -> Bool
  in_possession_of_valid_identity_document: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_recognised_as_national: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_exists: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_1_met: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_residence_application_during_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_2_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_3_met: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authorities: Person -> Bool
  has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authorities: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_4_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_5_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_6_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_7_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_8_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_9_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_10_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_11_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  any_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_present_on_territory(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_stay_conditions(p)))) => ((has_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((in_possession_of_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((in_possession_of_valid_passport(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((in_possession_of_valid_identity_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((national_authority_recognised_as_national(p)) & (national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((did_not_submit_residence_application_during_illegal_stay(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authorities(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authorities(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_7_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_8_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_9_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_11_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((absconding_criterion_1_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_7_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_8_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_9_met(p)) | ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p)) | (absconding_criterion_11_met(p))))))))))))) => ((any_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((individual_examination_performed(p)) & (any_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | ((subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure(p)))) & (risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p)))) => ((reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | ((subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure(p)))) & (reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_exists(p))).
}

case.text: Omar is a foreign national with a valid residence permit and resides lawfully on Belgian territory.

questions.text: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

expected.reason: Illegal stay requires presence without satisfying conditions for entry or stay; Omar has a valid residence permit and stays lawfully.

provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The alien is present on the territory.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The alien has an illegal stay on the territory.

in_possession_of_valid_travel_document.name: in_possession_of_valid_travel_document
in_possession_of_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

in_possession_of_valid_passport.name: in_possession_of_valid_passport
in_possession_of_valid_passport.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

in_possession_of_valid_identity_document.name: in_possession_of_valid_identity_document
in_possession_of_valid_identity_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.description: The national authority of the alien's country has recognised the alien as a national of that country.

national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid documents or recognition by national authority.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe the alien will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the alien has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

risk_of_absconding_exists.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
risk_of_absconding_exists.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(1) is met: the person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make their international protection application within the time limit.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry.

did_not_submit_residence_application_dur.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_during_illegal_stay
did_not_submit_residence_application_dur.description: The person did not submit a residence application during their illegal stay.

did_not_submit_international_protection_.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
did_not_submit_international_protection_.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(2) is met: the person used false/misleading information, false/falsified documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
used_false_or_misleading_information_in_.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_pro.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(3) is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of alien regulations.

does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authoritie.name: does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_alien_authoritie.description: The person does not cooperate with the authorities responsible for enforcement of or supervision of compliance with alien regulations.

has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authoritie.name: has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authorities
has_not_cooperated_with_alien_authoritie.description: The person has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for enforcement of or supervision of compliance with alien regulations.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(4) is met: the person has made clear they do not wish to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_tr.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_remova.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal_measure
failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_remova.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_ac.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_ac.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban.name: failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_le.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_li.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_eq.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(5) is met: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_mem.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(6) is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, terminating stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating their stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(7) is met: the person concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(8) is met: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in the issuance of a residence permit.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(9) is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: The person, while being questioned on that point, concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(10) is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to.name: declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom
declared_different_purpose_for_coming_to.description: The person declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_.name: file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_to_kingdom
file_shows_different_purpose_for_coming_.description: It appears from the file of the person that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Absconding criterion paragraph 2(11) is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

any_absconding_criterion_met.name: any_absconding_criterion_met
any_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

routing.question: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Is there, in the case of Omar, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

pipeline.natural_language: Cannot determine with certainty. has_illegal_stay(omar) is not logically forced either way (label: unknown).
